2606.29949.title: Data-Efficient Multimodal Alignment for Histopathology-based Molecular Prediction
2606.29949.paper_summary: H&E-stained whole-slide images offer cohort-scale availability and rich spatial context but lack molecular specificity, whereas bulk RNA-seq provides transcriptome-wide resolution at high cost with limited archival availability. We show that training a lightweight alignment module atop frozen histopathology and RNA-Seq foundation models enables open-vocabulary molecular prompting -- querying H&E slides with gene-set signatures to predict pathway activity without sequencing or end-to-end retraining. Using contrastive learning on a multi-cancer cohort (N=1,720), we achieve a 25-fold improvement in retrieval over baseline methods. Systematic analysis reveals a graduated predictability spectrum: morphologically grounded programs (cell-cycle programs, immune-related) are most reliably predicted (R^2>0.5), while predicting pathways with no morphological footprint remains challenging as expected. We validate clinical utility on the POSEIDON clinical trial: H&E-predicted squamous cell carcinoma scores recapitulate NSCLC subtype identity and predicted IFN-gamma mirror PD-L1 tumor-cell expression groups. Furthermore, genesets describing immune activation and fibrosis predict known tumor microenvironment archetypes from histology alone. We further validate generalization of our approach across unseen cohorts and demonstrate data-efficient domain adaptation, establishing a slide-native framework for molecular analysis on H&E images.
2606.29949.paper_summary_zh: H&E染色的全切片影像提供了群體規模的可用性和豐富的空間背景，但缺乏分子特異性，而大宗RNA-seq則以高成本提供全轉錄組解析，但存檔可用性有限。<lb/>我們展示了在冷凍的組織病理學和RNA-Seq基礎模型上訓練一個輕量級的對齊模塊，使得開放詞彙的分子提示成為可能——使用基因集簽名查詢H&E切片以預測通路活性，而無需測序或端到端的重新訓練。<lb/>通過在多癌症隊列（N=1,720）上使用對比學習，我們在檢索上實現了比基線方法高出25倍的改進。<lb/>系統分析揭示了一個漸進的可預測性光譜：以形態學為基礎的程序（細胞週期程序、免疫相關）最可靠地被預測（R^2>0.5），而預測沒有形態學特徵的通路仍然如預期般具有挑戰性。<lb/>我們在POSEIDON臨床試驗中驗證了臨床實用性：H&E預測的鱗狀細胞癌分數重現了NSCLC亞型身份，預測的IFN-gamma反映了PD-L1腫瘤細胞表達群體。<lb/>此外，描述免疫激活和纖維化的基因集僅從組織學中預測已知的腫瘤微環境原型。<lb/>我們進一步驗證了我們方法在未見隊列中的泛化能力，並展示了數據高效的領域適應，建立了一個針對H&E影像的分子分析的切片原生框架。
2606.29949.author: Dominik Winter et.al.
2606.29949.authors: Dominik Winter, Dominik Vonficht, Loïc Le Bescond, Christian Gebbe, Marco Rosati, Richard J. Chen, Markus Schick, Ross Stewart, Nicolas Brieu
